title: ‘Michael’ Wants to Start Something It Can’t Finish. Plus: ‘Mother Mary’ With David Lowery!
format: Sean, Amanda, and Bandsplain's Yasi Salik review two music movies, the Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael' and David Lowery's 'Mother Mary,' then Lowery joins Sean live from Vidiots.

films.title: Miami Vice
films.note: The announced Joseph Kosinski reboot with Michael B. Jordan and Austin Butler as Crockett and Tubbs, dated for 2027.

films.title: F1
films.note: Kosinski's last picture, cited as his current form.

films.title: Top Gun: Maverick
films.note: The other Kosinski hit; a third one is 'what the streets are saying,' not official.

films.title: 21 Jump Street
films.note: Floated as the meta-comedy model a Miami Vice movie could steal.

films.title: Caught Stealing
films.note: Austin Butler was 'kind of funny' in it, the group decides.

films.title: Paper Tiger
films.note: James Gray's new one, acquired by Neon and headed to Cannes; Scarlett Johansson, Adam Driver, Miles Teller.

films.title: Victorian Psycho
films.note: Zachary Wigon's new film heading to Un Certain Regard; Maika Monroe, Jason Isaacs, Thomasin McKenzie, Ruth Wilson.

films.title: Obsession
films.note: Curry Barker's May horror release; Barker was also hired to reboot The Texas Chain Saw Massacre.

films.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
films.note: The 1974 original, up for another reboot.

films.title: Strange Darling
films.note: JT Mollner's last film, a Yasi favorite.

films.title: Sleepaway Camp
films.note: One of Yasi's formative horror titles.

films.title: Carrie
films.note: The other formative one, 'quite an ending.'

films.title: Deliver Me From Nowhere
films.note: The Springsteen film Yasi last visited; would 'Bruce' have sold better?

films.title: Michael
films.note: Directed by Antoine Fuqua, written by John Logan, with Jafar Jackson as the adult Michael and Juliano Krue Valdi as the child. The performances and staged numbers are uncanny; the group agrees the movie recreates the tape without getting under the surface. It ends around 1988, after 'Bad,' since a scrapped third act addressing the abuse allegations was cut for legal reasons. What's left is a sealed hagiography that skips over Janet and anger, leaning on Bill Bray's reaction shots for its emotional spine. Colman Domingo, Nia Long, Larenz Tate as Berry Gordy, Laura Harrier as Suzanne de Passe, Miles Teller and Mike Myers in small parts.

films.title: Mother Mary
films.note: A two-hander about a Madonna-coded pop star (Anne Hathaway) and her estranged costume designer (Michaela Coel), talky and chamber-bound before it turns into a gothic ghost story. Songs by Charli XCX and Jack Antonoff; supporting turns from Hunter Schafer, FKA Twigs, Kaia Gerber, Alba Baptista, and Jessica Brown Findlay. All three loved it; Yasi most of all for how much it leaves open.

films.title: Mother Mary
films.note: Seven years in the writing, begun on the set of The Green Knight during a dark, feverish night; shot largely in sequence, with one circle scene budgeted for two days that ran seven.

films.title: The Green Knight
films.note: The two-hander scene with Dev Patel and Sean Harris is what made him want to make a small film about actors in a room.

films.title: A Ghost Story
films.note: His earlier fabric-ghost movie; Annelle, who built that ghost, made the rod puppets here.

films.title: Ain't Them Bodies Saints
films.note: He hid a favorite song inside the film's gunshots; won't say which.

films.title: Peter Pan & Wendy
films.note: A big, hard shoot with one cherished two-day chamber scene between Jude Law and Ever Anderson.

films.title: The Old Man & the Gun
films.note: One of his three prior visits to the show.

films.title: Anna Karenina
films.note: Hathaway's hand-gesture language traces back to Lowery's love of the novel, and the film.

films.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
films.note: The T-1000's melt was the reference for a ghost that can't decide what form to take.

films.title: Explorers
films.note: A Joe Dante TV adaptation he once developed, which sent him deep into quantum physics.

films.title: Melancholia
films.note: The last great thing he saw: the Alamo showed it, better than he remembered.

films.title: The Testament of Ann Lee
films.note: An old-but-new favorite he keeps rewatching; would double-feature with Mother Mary.

films: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story
Jimi: All Is by My Side

Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story

Jimi: All Is by My Side.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
